name: Aron, the Ogdoadic King
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>溟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－アロン
desc: If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 2 monsters; Special Summon this card. If your opponent adds a card(s) to their hand (except during the Draw Phase or Damage Step): You can send 1 random card from their hand to the GY. If a monster(s) your opponent controls is sent to the GY (except during the Damage Step): You can add 1 LIGHT or DARK Reptile monster from your Deck or GY to your hand, except "Aron, the Ogdoadic King". You can only use each effect of "Aron, the Ogdoadic King" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 2 monsters; Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Aron, the Ogdoadic King" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 2 monsters; Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Aron, the Ogdoadic King" once per turn.

action: Activates if your opponent draws a card
Activates if your opponent adds a card to the hand
Sends from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Graveyard
Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
